\tzpentry{ID4231}{Alfvn Alfven Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4231 introduces Alfvn Alfven Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\omega_{\text{Alfvén}} = k v_A = k B/\sqrt{\mu_0\rho}$
\]
